---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the analytics platform
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 💡 Motivation
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 📊 Use Case
Describe how this feature would be used in the context of analytics:
- What type of data would it process?
- What analytics insights would it provide?
- How would it fit into existing JSON configurations?

## 💻 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Example Configuration
If applicable, provide an example of how this feature might be configured in JSON:

```json
{
  "newFeature": {
    "enabled": true,
    "configuration": {
      // Example configuration
    }
  }
}
```

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📈 Impact Assessment
Help us understand the potential impact:
- [ ] This would improve performance
- [ ] This would improve usability
- [ ] This would add new analytics capabilities
- [ ] This would improve configuration flexibility
- [ ] This addresses a security concern
- [ ] This would help with scalability

## 🎯 Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would be helpful
- [ ] Important for my use case
- [ ] Critical/blocking

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## ✔️ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests that might be similar
- [ ] I have described the use case clearly
- [ ] I have provided example configurations where applicable
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing functionality
